posts.author: raptoris
posts.title: French court clears a path for Le Pen to run for office but upholds conviction

link_metadata.description: A French appeals court has upheld a conviction on far-right leader Marine Le Pen for misusing EU funds but shortened a ban on her running for elected office, opening the door for her to stand in next year’s presidential election.
link_metadata.title: French court clears a path for Le Pen to run for office but upholds conviction | CNN
